mapper.select: SELECT id, registration_id, doctor_id, patient_id, visit_time, diagnosis, symptoms, consultation_fee FROM outpatient_visit
SELECT id, registration_id, doctor_id, patient_id, visit_time, diagnosis, symptoms, consultation_fee FROM outpatient_visit WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, registration_id, doctor_id, patient_id, visit_time, diagnosis, symptoms, consultation_fee FROM outpatient_visit WHERE registration_id = #{registrationId}
SELECT id, registration_id, doctor_id, patient_id, visit_time, diagnosis, symptoms, consultation_fee FROM outpatient_visit WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY visit_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outpatient_visit (registration_id, doctor_id, patient_id, visit_time, diagnosis, symptoms, consultation_fee) VALUES (#{registrationId}, #{doctorId}, #{patientId}, #{visitTime}, #{diagnosis}, #{symptoms}, #{consultationFee})
mapper.select: SELECT ov.id, ov.visit_time, ov.diagnosis, ov.symptoms, ov.consultation_fee, p.name AS patient_name, p.patient_no, pr.id AS prescription_id, pr.total_drug_price, (COALESCE(ov.consultation_fee, 0) + COALESCE(pr.total_drug_price, 0)) AS total_cost FROM outpatient_visit ov JOIN patient p ON ov.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN prescription pr ON pr.visit_id = ov.id WHERE ov.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY ov.visit_time DESC
